====== Profile.cshtml ======
@using System.Security.Claims
@model GameWiki.Models.User
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Mój Profil";
    var articles = ViewBag.UserArticles as IEnumerable<dynamic> ?? Enumerable.Empty<dynamic>();
}

<div class="container py-5">
    <div class="row justify-content-center">
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="gw-card p-4 shadow-lg" style="background: #1a1d26; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);">
                <div class="text-center mb-4">
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.ProfilePictureUrl))
                    {
                        <img src="@Model.ProfilePictureUrl" alt="Avatar" class="rounded-circle mx-auto d-block mb-3"
                             style="width: 100px; height: 100px; object-fit: cover; border: 3px solid #6366f1; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.4);" />
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="gw-profile-avatar-large mx-auto mb-3">
                            @Model.Username.Substring(0, 1).ToUpper()
                        </div>
                    }
                    <h2 class="mt-3 fw-bold text-white">@Model.Username</h2>
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.Description))
                    {
                        <div class="mt-4 px-4 text-center">
                            <p class="text-light fst-italic" style="color: #cbd5e1;">"@Model.Description"</p>
                        </div>
                    }
                    @{
                        string badgeClass = ViewBag.RoleName switch
                        {
                            "Admin" => "nav-badge-admin",
                            "Moderator" => "nav-badge-mod",
                            _ => "nav-badge-user"
                        };
                    }
                    <span class="@badgeClass px-3 py-2 mt-2" style="font-size: 0.9rem;">@ViewBag.RoleName</span>
                </div>

                <div class="row mt-5 text-center">
                    <div class="col-sm-4 mb-4">
                        <label class="small text-uppercase fw-bold" style="color: #94a3b8; letter-spacing: 1px;">Adres Email</label>
                        <p class="fs-5 text-white mt-1">@Model.Email</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-sm-4 mb-4">
                        <label class="small text-uppercase fw-bold" style="color: #94a3b8; letter-spacing: 1px;">Recenzje</label>
                        <p class="fs-5 text-white mt-1">@(Model.Reviews?.Count ?? 0)</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-sm-4 mb-4">
                        <label class="small text-uppercase fw-bold" style="color: #94a3b8; letter-spacing: 1px;">Artykuły</label>
                        <p class="fs-5 text-white mt-1">@articles.Count()</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="mt-4 pt-4 border-top border-secondary text-center">
                    <a asp-controller="Home" asp-action="Index" class="btn btn-outline-light px-4">Wróć do strony głównej</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    @if (TempData["SuccessMessage"] != null)
    {
        <div class="row justify-content-center mt-3">
            <div class="col-md-8">
                <div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
                    @TempData["SuccessMessage"]
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    }
    else if (TempData["ErrorMessage"] != null)
    {
        <div class="row justify-content-center mt-3">
            <div class="col-md-8">
                <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
                    @TempData["ErrorMessage"]
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    }

    <!-- SEKCJA: MOJE ARTYKUŁY -->
    <div class="row justify-content-center mt-5">
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
                <h3 class="text-white fw-bold mb-0">Moje Artykuły 📝</h3>
                <a asp-controller="Articles" asp-action="Create" class="gw-btn-primary" style="font-size: 0.85rem; padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem;">
                    + Napisz artykuł
                </a>
            </div>

            @if (articles.Any())
            {
                <div class="d-flex flex-column gap-3">
                    @foreach (var article in articles)
                    {
                        <div style="background: #1a1d26; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); padding: 1rem 1.25rem;">
                            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start">
                                <div>
                                    <a asp-controller="Articles" asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@article.Id"
                                       class="text-white fw-bold text-decoration-none fs-6">
                                        @article.Title
                                    </a>
                                    <div class="mt-1" style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #64748b;">
                                        🎮 @article.GameTitle &nbsp;·&nbsp;
                                        📅 @((DateTime)article.CreatedAt).ToString("dd.MM.yyyy")
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                    @if ((bool)article.IsVerified)
                                    {
                                        <span style="background: rgba(34,197,94,0.15); color: #22c55e; border: 1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.3); border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.75rem; padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem; font-weight: 600;">
                                            ✓ Zweryfikowany
                                        </span>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <span style="background: rgba(234,179,8,0.15); color: #eab308; border: 1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.3); border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.75rem; padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem; font-weight: 600;">
                                            ⏳ Oczekuje
                                        </span>
                                    }
                                    <a asp-controller="Articles" asp-action="Edit" asp-route-id="@article.Id"
                                       class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" style="font-size: 0.75rem; padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem;">
                                        Edytuj
                                    </a>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            }
            else
            {
                <div class="alert text-center" style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #94a3b8; border: 1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.2);">
                    Nie napisałeś jeszcze żadnego artykułu.
                    <a asp-controller="Articles" asp-action="Create" style="color: #a78bfa;">Napisz pierwszy!</a>
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- SEKCJA: MOJE KOLEKCJE -->
    <div class="row justify-content-center mt-5">
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
                <h3 class="text-white fw-bold mb-0">Moje Kolekcje 📁</h3>
                <form asp-controller="Favorites" asp-action="CreateList" method="post" class="d-flex">
                    <input type="hidden" name="returnUrl" value="/Account/Profile" />
                    <input type="text" name="name" class="form-control bg-dark text-light border-secondary me-2"
                           placeholder="Nazwa nowej listy..." required maxlength="50" />
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary rounded-pill px-4">+</button>
                </form>
            </div>

            @if (Model.FavoriteLists != null && Model.FavoriteLists.Any())
            {
                <div class="row">
                    @foreach (var list in Model.FavoriteLists)
                    {
                        <div class="col-md-6 mb-4">
                            <div class="gw-card p-3 h-100" style="background: #1a1d26; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);">
                                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">
                                    <h5 class="text-white fw-bold m-0">@list.Name</h5>
                                    <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3">
                                        <span class="small text-uppercase fw-bold" style="color: #94a3b8; letter-spacing: 1px;">
                                            Gier: @list.FavoriteGames.Count
                                        </span>
                                        <form asp-controller="Favorites" asp-action="DeleteList" method="post" class="m-0"
                                              onsubmit="return confirm('Czy na pewno chcesz usunąć całą kolekcję @list.Name?');">
                                            <input type="hidden" name="listId" value="@list.Id" />
                                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-link text-danger p-0 text-decoration-none fs-5" title="Usuń kolekcję">🗑️</button>
                                        </form>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                <form asp-controller="Favorites" asp-action="AddToFavorite" method="post" class="mb-3">
                                    <input type="hidden" name="listId" value="@list.Id" />
                                    <input type="hidden" name="returnUrl" value="/Account/Profile" />
                                    <div class="input-group input-group-sm">
                                        <select name="gameId" class="form-select bg-dark text-light border-secondary"
                                                style="border-top-left-radius: 20px; border-bottom-left-radius: 20px;" required>
                                            <option value="">--Wybierz grę--</option>
                                            @if (ViewBag.AllGames != null)
                                            {
                                                foreach (var game in (IEnumerable<dynamic>)ViewBag.AllGames)
                                                {
                                                    <option value="@game.Id">@game.Title</option>
                                                }
                                            }
                                        </select>
                                        <button class="btn btn-primary px-3" type="submit"
                                                style="border-top-right-radius: 20px; border-bottom-right-radius: 20px;">
                                            Dodaj
                                        </button>
                                    </div>
                                </form>

                                @if (list.FavoriteGames.Any())
                                {
                                    <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                                        @foreach (var item in list.FavoriteGames)
                                        {
                                            <div class="badge bg-dark border border-secondary d-flex align-items-center p-0 overflow-hidden" style="font-size: 0.75rem;">
                                                <span class="px-2 py-2 text-white">@item.Game.Title</span>
                                                <form asp-controller="Favorites" asp-action="RemoveFromFavorite" method="post" class="m-0">
                                                    <input type="hidden" name="gameId" value="@item.GameId" />
                                                    <input type="hidden" name="listId" value="@list.Id" />
                                                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm border-0 rounded-0 px-2 py-2"
                                                            style="font-size: 0.6rem; background: rgba(220, 53, 69, 0.2);" title="Usuń z listy">
                                                        ✕
                                                    </button>
                                                </form>
                                            </div>
                                        }
                                    </div>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <p class="small text-uppercase fw-bold m-0" style="color: #94a3b8; letter-spacing: 1px;">Ta lista jest pusta</p>
                                }
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            }
            else
            {
                <div class="alert text-center" style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #94a3b8; border: 1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.2);">
                    Nie masz jeszcze żadnych kolekcji. Stwórz swoją pierwszą listę korzystając z pola powyżej!
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

====== Settings.cshtml ======
@model GameWiki.DTOs.Auth.UpdateProfileDto
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Ustawienia Konta";
}

<div class="container py-5">
    <div class="row">
        @if (TempData["SuccessMessage"] != null)
        {
            <div class="alert alert-success mb-4">@TempData["SuccessMessage"]</div>
        }
        @if (TempData["ErrorMessage"] != null)
        {
            <div class="alert alert-danger mb-4">@TempData["ErrorMessage"]</div>
        }

        <div class="col-md-4 mb-4">
            <div class="gw-card p-4 mb-4" style="background: #1a1d26; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);">
                <h4 class="text-white mb-4">Zdjęcie profilowe</h4>
                <div class="text-center mb-3">
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(ViewBag.ProfilePictureUrl))
                    {
                        <img src="@ViewBag.ProfilePictureUrl" alt="Avatar" class="rounded-circle" style="width: 120px; height: 120px; object-fit: cover; border: 3px solid #6366f1;" />
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="gw-profile-avatar-large mx-auto">
                            @Model.Username.Substring(0, 1).ToUpper()
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
                <form asp-action="UploadAvatar" method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <input type="file" name="avatarFile" class="form-control bg-dark text-light" accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png" required />
                    </div>
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-100 rounded-pill">Wgraj zdjęcie</button>
                </form>
            </div>

            <div class="gw-card p-4" style="background: #1a1d26; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);">
                <h4 class="text-white mb-4">Zmiana hasła</h4>
                <form asp-action="ChangePassword" method="post">
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <input type="password" name="CurrentPassword" class="form-control gw-input" placeholder="Obecne hasło" required />
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <input type="password" name="NewPassword" class="form-control gw-input" placeholder="Nowe hasło (min. 8 znaków, m.in. znak specjalny)" required />
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-3">
                        <input type="password" name="ConfirmNewPassword" class="form-control gw-input" placeholder="Potwierdź nowe hasło" required />
                    </div>
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-danger w-100 rounded-pill">Zmień hasło</button>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="gw-card p-4" style="background: #1a1d26; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);">
                <h4 class="text-white mb-4">Informacje podstawowe</h4>
                <form asp-action="UpdateProfile" method="post">
                    <div asp-validation-summary="ModelOnly" class="text-danger mb-3"></div>

                    <div class="mb-4">
                        <label asp-for="Username" class="gw-label"></label>
                        <input asp-for="Username" class="form-control gw-input" />
                        <span asp-validation-for="Username" class="text-danger small"></span>
                    </div>

                    <div class="mb-4">
                        <label asp-for="Email" class="gw-label"></label>
                        <input asp-for="Email" class="form-control gw-input" />
                        <span asp-validation-for="Email" class="text-danger small"></span>
                    </div>

                    <div class="mb-4">
                        <label asp-for="Description" class="gw-label"></label>
                        <textarea asp-for="Description" class="form-control gw-input" rows="4" placeholder="Napisz coś o sobie i swoich ulubionych grach..."></textarea>
                        <span asp-validation-for="Description" class="text-danger small"></span>
                    </div>

                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-end">
                        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success px-5 rounded-pill">Zapisz zmiany</button>
                    </div>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    @{
        await Html.RenderPartialAsync("_ValidationScriptsPartial");
    }
}

====== Index.cshtml ======
@model IEnumerable<GameWiki.DTOs.Admin.UserListDto>
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Panel Zarządzania";
    var currentUserId = int.Parse(User.FindFirst(System.Security.Claims.ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier)!.Value);
}

<div class="container py-5">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
        <h2 class="text-white fw-bold">Panel Administracyjny 🛡️</h2>
        <a asp-controller="Admin" asp-action="PendingArticles" class="btn btn-outline-warning">
            📋 Artykuły do weryfikacji
        </a>
    </div>

    @if (TempData["SuccessMessage"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show">
            @TempData["SuccessMessage"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }
    @if (TempData["ErrorMessage"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show">
            @TempData["ErrorMessage"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }

    <div class="gw-card p-4" style="background: #1a1d26; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);">
        <div class="table-responsive">
            <table class="table table-dark table-hover align-middle mb-0" style="background: transparent;">
                <thead>
                    <tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #334155;">
                        <th class="text-uppercase small" style="color: #94a3b8;">Użytkownik</th>
                        <th class="text-uppercase small" style="color: #94a3b8;">Email</th>
                        <th class="text-uppercase small" style="color: #94a3b8;">Rola</th>
                        <th class="text-uppercase small" style="color: #94a3b8;">Status</th>
                        <th class="text-uppercase small text-end" style="color: #94a3b8;">Akcje</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var user in Model)
                    {
                        <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);">
                            <td class="fw-bold text-white py-3">@user.Username</td>
                            <td class="text-light">@user.Email</td>
                            <td>
                                @if (user.RoleName == "Admin")
                                {
                                    <span class="badge bg-danger">Admin</span>
                                }
                                else if (user.RoleName == "Moderator")
                                {
                                    <span class="badge bg-warning text-dark">Moderator</span>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="badge bg-secondary">User</span>
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                @if (user.IsBanned)
                                {
                                    <span class="badge bg-danger">Zbanowany</span>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="badge bg-success">Aktywny</span>
                                }
                            </td>
                            <td class="text-end">
                                @if (user.Id != currentUserId && user.RoleName != "Admin")
                                {
                                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-end gap-2">
                                        @if (User.IsInRole("Admin") || (User.IsInRole("Moderator") && user.RoleName == "User"))
                                        {
                                            <form asp-action="ToggleBan" method="post" class="m-0">
                                                <input type="hidden" name="userId" value="@user.Id" />
                                                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm @(user.IsBanned ? "btn-outline-success" : "btn-outline-danger")">
                                                    @(user.IsBanned ? "Odbanuj" : "Zbanuj")
                                                </button>
                                            </form>
                                        }

                                        @if (User.IsInRole("Admin"))
                                        {
                                            <form asp-action="ToggleModRole" method="post" class="m-0">
                                                <input type="hidden" name="userId" value="@user.Id" />
                                                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm @(user.RoleName == "Moderator" ? "btn-outline-warning" : "btn-outline-info")">
                                                    @(user.RoleName == "Moderator" ? "Zdegraduj z Moda" : "Awansuj na Moda")
                                                </button>
                                            </form>
                                        }
                                    </div>
                                }
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

====== PendingArticles.cshtml ======
@model IEnumerable<GameWiki.Models.Article>
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Artykuły do weryfikacji";
}

<div class="container py-5">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
        <div>
            <h2 class="text-white fw-bold">📋 Artykuły do weryfikacji</h2>
            <p style="color:#64748b; margin:0; font-size:0.88rem;">Artykuły dodane przez użytkowników oczekujące na zatwierdzenie</p>
        </div>
        <a asp-controller="Admin" asp-action="Index" class="gw-btn-outline" style="font-size:0.88rem;">← Panel admina</a>
    </div>

    @if (TempData["SuccessMessage"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show mb-4">
            @TempData["SuccessMessage"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }

    @if (!Model.Any())
    {
        <div class="gw-auth-card" style="text-align:center; padding:3rem;">
            <div style="font-size:3rem; margin-bottom:1rem;">✅</div>
            <p style="color:#94a3b8;">Brak artykułów oczekujących na weryfikację.</p>
        </div>
    }
    else
    {
        <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:1rem;">
            @foreach (var article in Model)
            {
                <div class="gw-card" style="display:flex; gap:1.2rem; padding:1.2rem; align-items:flex-start; background:#1a1d26; border-radius:12px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);">
                    @* Miniatura *@
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(article.CoverImageUrl))
                    {
                        <img src="@article.CoverImageUrl" alt="Cover"
                             style="width:110px; height:70px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); flex-shrink:0;" />
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div style="width:110px; height:70px; border-radius:8px; flex-shrink:0;
                                                background:rgba(99,102,241,0.12); border:1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.2);
                                                display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:1.8rem;">
                            📄
                        </div>
                    }

                    @* Info *@
                    <div style="flex:1; min-width:0;">
                        <div style="font-size:1rem; font-weight:700; color:#e2e8f0; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">
                            @article.Title
                            <span class="badge bg-warning text-dark ms-2" style="font-size:0.68rem; vertical-align:middle;">Niezweryfikowany</span>
                        </div>
                        <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; font-size:0.8rem; color:#64748b; flex-wrap:wrap;">
                            <span>🎮 @article.Game?.Title</span>
                            <span>✍️ @article.Author?.Username</span>
                            <span>🕐 @article.CreatedAt.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    @* Akcje *@
                    <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0.5rem; flex-shrink:0;">
                        <a asp-controller="Article" asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@article.Id"
                           class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" target="_blank">
                            👁️ Podgląd
                        </a>
                        <form asp-controller="Article" asp-action="Verify" asp-route-id="@article.Id"
                              method="post" style="margin:0;">
                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-success w-100">✅ Zatwierdź</button>
                        </form>
                        <form asp-controller="Article" asp-action="Reject" asp-route-id="@article.Id"
                              method="post" style="margin:0;"
                              onsubmit="return confirm('Odrzucić i usunąć artykuł?');">
                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger w-100">❌ Odrzuć</button>
                        </form>
                    </div>
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    }
</div>

====== Create.cshtml ======
@model GameWiki.DTOs.Article.CreateArticleDto
@using GameWiki.Models
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Nowy artykuł";
    var games = ViewBag.Games as List<Game> ?? new List<Game>();
}

<div class="gw-auth-wrapper">
    <div class="gw-auth-card" style="max-width:720px;">

        <div class="gw-auth-header">
            <div class="gw-auth-icon">✍️</div>
            <h1 class="gw-auth-title">Napisz artykuł</h1>
            <p class="gw-auth-sub">Uzupełnij informacje i dodaj treść</p>
        </div>

        @if (!User.IsInRole("Admin") && !User.IsInRole("Moderator"))
        {
            <div class="alert alert-info" style="background:rgba(99,102,241,0.12); border:1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.3); color:#a5b4fc; border-radius:10px; padding:0.8rem 1rem; margin-bottom:1.5rem; font-size:0.88rem;">
                ℹ️ Twój artykuł trafi do moderacji i zostanie opublikowany po zatwierdzeniu.
            </div>
        }

        <form asp-action="Create" method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="articleForm">
            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()

            @* Gra *@
            <div class="gw-form-group">
                <label class="gw-label">Gra</label>
                <select name="GameId" class="gw-input" required>
                    <option value="">— wybierz grę —</option>
                    @foreach (var g in games)
                    {
                        <option value="@g.Id" selected="@(Model.GameId == g.Id)">@g.Title</option>
                    }
                </select>
            </div>

            @* Tytuł *@
            <div class="gw-form-group">
                <label asp-for="Title" class="gw-label"></label>
                <input asp-for="Title" class="gw-input" placeholder="Tytuł artykułu" />
                <span asp-validation-for="Title" class="gw-field-error"></span>
            </div>

            @* Zdjęcie tytułowe *@
            <div class="gw-form-group">
                <label class="gw-label">Zdjęcie tytułowe <span style="color:#64748b; font-weight:400;">(opcjonalne)</span></label>
                <input type="file" name="CoverImage" accept="image/*" class="gw-input"
                       style="padding:0.45rem 0.75rem;" id="coverInput" />
                <div id="coverPreview" style="display:none; margin-top:0.6rem;">
                    <img id="coverPreviewImg" src="" alt="Podgląd"
                         style="max-height:160px; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);" />
                </div>
            </div>

            @* Bloki treści *@
            <div class="gw-form-group">
                <label class="gw-label">Treść artykułu</label>
                <p style="font-size:0.82rem; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
                    Dodawaj bloki tekstu i zdjęć w dowolnej kolejności.
                </p>

                <div id="blocksContainer" style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0.8rem;">
                </div>

                <div style="display:flex; gap:0.6rem; margin-top:0.8rem;">
                    <button type="button" onclick="addTextBlock()" class="gw-btn-outline" style="font-size:0.85rem;">
                        + Blok tekstu
                    </button>
                    <button type="button" onclick="addImageBlock()" class="gw-btn-outline" style="font-size:0.85rem;">
                        + Zdjęcie
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display:flex; gap:0.8rem; margin-top:1.8rem;">
                <button type="submit" class="gw-btn-primary gw-btn-full">✚ Opublikuj artykuł</button>
                <a asp-action="Index" class="gw-btn-outline gw-btn-full" style="text-align:center;">Anuluj</a>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
<script>
    let blockIndex = 0;

    function addTextBlock() {
        const i = blockIndex++;
        const container = document.getElementById('blocksContainer');
        const div = document.createElement('div');
        div.className = 'gw-block-item';
        div.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(15,17,23,0.6);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;position:relative;';
        div.innerHTML = `
            <input type="hidden" name="Blocks[${i}].Type" value="0" />
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">
                <span style="font-size:0.78rem;color:#64748b;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em;">📝 Tekst</span>
                <button type="button" onclick="removeBlock(this)" style="background:none;border:none;color:#f87171;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;padding:0;">✕</button>
            </div>
            <textarea name="Blocks[${i}].TextContent" class="gw-input" rows="5"
                      placeholder="Treść bloku..." style="resize:vertical;margin:0;"></textarea>
        `;
        container.appendChild(div);
    }

    function addImageBlock() {
        const i = blockIndex++;
        const container = document.getElementById('blocksContainer');
        const div = document.createElement('div');
        div.className = 'gw-block-item';
        div.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(15,17,23,0.6);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;position:relative;';
        div.innerHTML = `
            <input type="hidden" name="Blocks[${i}].Type" value="1" />
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">
                <span style="font-size:0.78rem;color:#64748b;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em;">🖼️ Zdjęcie</span>
                <button type="button" onclick="removeBlock(this)" style="background:none;border:none;color:#f87171;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;padding:0;">✕</button>
            </div>
            <input type="file" name="Blocks[${i}].ImageFile" accept="image/*" class="gw-input"
                   style="padding:0.45rem 0.75rem;" onchange="previewBlockImage(this)" />
            <div class="block-preview" style="display:none;margin-top:0.5rem;">
                <img src="" alt="Podgląd" style="max-height:140px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);" />
            </div>
        `;
        container.appendChild(div);
    }

    function removeBlock(btn) {
        btn.closest('.gw-block-item').remove();
    }

    function previewBlockImage(input) {
        const preview = input.parentElement.querySelector('.block-preview');
        const img = preview.querySelector('img');
        if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
            img.src = URL.createObjectURL(input.files[0]);
            preview.style.display = 'block';
        }
    }

    // Podgląd zdjęcia tytułowego
    document.getElementById('coverInput').addEventListener('change', function () {
        const preview = document.getElementById('coverPreview');
        const img = document.getElementById('coverPreviewImg');
        if (this.files && this.files[0]) {
            img.src = URL.createObjectURL(this.files[0]);
            preview.style.display = 'block';
        }
    });

    // Zacznij od jednego pustego bloku tekstowego
    addTextBlock();
</script>
}

====== Details.cshtml ======
@model GameWiki.Models.Article
@using GameWiki.Models
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = Model.Title;
    var allComments = (List<Comment>)ViewBag.AllComments;
    var myReactions = (List<CommentReaction>)ViewBag.MyReactions;
    var currentUserId = int.TryParse(User.FindFirst(System.Security.Claims.ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier)?.Value, out int uid) ? uid : 0;

    IEnumerable<Comment> RootComments() => allComments.Where(c => c.ParentCommentId == null);
    IEnumerable<Comment> Replies(int parentId) => allComments.Where(c => c.ParentCommentId == parentId).OrderBy(c => c.CreatedAt);
}

<div class="gw-section">

    @* ── NAGŁÓWEK ── *@
    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.CoverImageUrl))
    {
        <div class="gw-details-banner" style="background-image:url('@Model.CoverImageUrl');">
            <div class="gw-details-banner-overlay">
                <h1 class="gw-details-title">@Model.Title</h1>
                <span class="gw-details-date">
                    @Model.Game?.Title &nbsp;·&nbsp; ✍️ @Model.Author?.Username
                    &nbsp;·&nbsp; @Model.CreatedAt.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy")
                    @if (!Model.IsVerified)
                    {
                        <span class="badge bg-warning text-dark ms-2" style="font-size:0.7rem;">Oczekuje na weryfikację</span>
                    }
                </span>
            </div>
        </div>
    }
    else
    {
        <div class="gw-auth-header">
            <div class="gw-auth-icon">📄</div>
            <h1 class="gw-auth-title">@Model.Title</h1>
            <p class="gw-auth-sub">
                @Model.Game?.Title &nbsp;·&nbsp; ✍️ @Model.Author?.Username
                &nbsp;·&nbsp; @Model.CreatedAt.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy")
                @if (!Model.IsVerified)
                {
                    <span class="badge bg-warning text-dark ms-2">Oczekuje na weryfikację</span>
                }
            </p>
        </div>
    }

    @if (TempData["SuccessMessage"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show mt-3">
            @TempData["SuccessMessage"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }
    @if (TempData["ErrorMessage"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show mt-3">
            @TempData["ErrorMessage"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }

    @* ── TREŚĆ ARTYKUŁU ── *@
    <div style="max-width:780px; margin:2rem auto 0;">
        @foreach (var block in Model.Blocks)
        {
            if (block.Type == ArticleBlockType.Text)
            {
                <div style="color:#cbd5e1; font-size:1rem; line-height:1.85; margin-bottom:1.4rem; white-space:pre-wrap;">@block.Content</div>
            }
            else if (block.Type == ArticleBlockType.Image && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(block.Content))
            {
                <div style="margin:1.6rem 0; text-align:center;">
                    <img src="@block.Content" alt="Ilustracja"
                         style="max-width:100%; border-radius:10px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);" />
                </div>
            }
        }

        @* ── AKCJE ── *@
        <div style="display:flex; gap:0.8rem; margin-top:2rem; flex-wrap:wrap;">
            @if (User.IsInRole("Admin") || User.IsInRole("Moderator") || Model.AuthorId == currentUserId)
            {
                <a asp-action="Edit" asp-route-id="@Model.Id" class="gw-btn-primary">✏️ Edytuj</a>
                <form asp-action="Delete" asp-route-id="@Model.Id" method="post" style="margin:0;"
                      onsubmit="return confirm('Na pewno usunąć artykuł?');">
                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                    <button type="submit" class="gw-btn-outline" style="color:#f87171; border-color:#f87171;">🗑️ Usuń</button>
                </form>
            }
            <a asp-action="Index" asp-route-gameId="@Model.GameId" class="gw-btn-outline">← Wróć</a>
        </div>

        @* ── SEKCJA KOMENTARZY ── *@
        <div style="margin-top:3rem;">
            <h2 style="font-size:1.2rem; font-weight:700; color:#e2e8f0; margin-bottom:1.2rem; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); padding-bottom:0.6rem;">
                💬 Komentarze (@allComments.Count)
            </h2>

            @* Formularz nowego komentarza *@
            @if (User.Identity?.IsAuthenticated == true)
            {
                <form asp-action="AddComment" asp-route-articleId="@Model.Id" method="post"
                      style="margin-bottom:2rem;">
                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                    <input type="hidden" name="articleId" value="@Model.Id" />
                    <textarea name="content" class="gw-input" rows="3"
                          placeholder="Napisz komentarz..."
                          style="resize:vertical; margin-bottom:0.6rem;"></textarea>
                    <button type="submit" class="gw-btn-primary" style="font-size:0.88rem;">Dodaj komentarz</button>
                </form>
            }
            else
            {
                <div class="gw-auth-card" style="text-align:center; padding:1.2rem; margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
                    <a asp-controller="Account" asp-action="Login" class="gw-action-link">Zaloguj się</a>, żeby dodać komentarz.
                </div>
            }

            @* Lista komentarzy *@
            @foreach (var comment in RootComments())
            {
                var commentViewData = new ViewDataDictionary(ViewData);
                commentViewData["AllComments"] = allComments;
                commentViewData["MyReactions"] = myReactions;
                commentViewData["CurrentUserId"] = currentUserId;
                commentViewData["ArticleId"] = Model.Id;
                commentViewData["Depth"] = 0;
                @await Html.PartialAsync("_Comment", comment, commentViewData)
            }
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

====== Edit.cshtml ======
@model GameWiki.Models.Article
@using GameWiki.Models
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Edytuj artykuł";
    int initialBlockIndex = Model.Blocks?.Count ?? 0;
}

<div class="gw-auth-wrapper">
    <div class="gw-auth-card" style="max-width:720px;">

        <div class="gw-auth-header">
            <div class="gw-auth-icon">✏️</div>
            <h1 class="gw-auth-title">Edytuj artykuł</h1>
            <p class="gw-auth-sub">@Model.Game?.Title</p>
        </div>

        <form asp-action="Edit" asp-route-id="@Model.Id" method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="editForm">
            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()

            @* Tytuł *@
            <div class="gw-form-group">
                <label class="gw-label">Tytuł</label>
                <input name="Title" value="@Model.Title" class="gw-input" required maxlength="200" />
            </div>

            @* Zdjęcie tytułowe *@
            <div class="gw-form-group">
                <label class="gw-label">Zdjęcie tytułowe</label>
                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.CoverImageUrl))
                {
                    <div style="margin-bottom:0.6rem;">
                        <img src="@Model.CoverImageUrl" alt="Obecne zdjęcie tytułowe"
                             style="max-height:140px; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);" />
                        <p style="font-size:0.78rem; color:#64748b; margin-top:0.3rem;">Obecne zdjęcie. Wgraj nowe, żeby je zastąpić.</p>
                    </div>
                }
                <input type="file" name="CoverImage" accept="image/*" class="gw-input"
                       style="padding:0.45rem 0.75rem;" id="coverInput" />
                <div id="coverPreview" style="display:none; margin-top:0.5rem;">
                    <img id="coverPreviewImg" src="" alt="Podgląd"
                         style="max-height:140px; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);" />
                </div>
            </div>

            @* Bloki treści *@
            <div class="gw-form-group">
                <label class="gw-label">Treść artykułu</label>
                <p style="font-size:0.82rem; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
                    Możesz dodawać, usuwać i zmieniać kolejność bloków.
                </p>

                <div id="blocksContainer" style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0.8rem;">
                    @* Istniejące bloki renderujemy z serwera *@
                    @{
                        int bi = 0;
                    }
                    @foreach (var block in Model.Blocks)
                    {
                        if (block.Type == ArticleBlockType.Text)
                        {
                            <div class="gw-block-item" style="background:rgba(15,17,23,0.6);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;position:relative;">
                                <input type="hidden" name="Blocks[@bi].Type" value="0" />
                                <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">
                                    <span style="font-size:0.78rem;color:#64748b;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em;">📝 Tekst</span>
                                    <button type="button" onclick="removeBlock(this)" style="background:none;border:none;color:#f87171;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;padding:0;">✕</button>
                                </div>
                                <textarea name="Blocks[@bi].TextContent" class="gw-input" rows="5"
                                  style="resize:vertical;margin:0;">@block.Content</textarea>
                            </div>
                        }
                        else if (block.Type == ArticleBlockType.Image)
                        {
                            <div class="gw-block-item" style="background:rgba(15,17,23,0.6);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;position:relative;">
                                <input type="hidden" name="Blocks[@bi].Type" value="1" />
                                <input type="hidden" name="Blocks[@bi].ExistingImageUrl" value="@block.Content" />
                                <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">
                                    <span style="font-size:0.78rem;color:#64748b;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em;">🖼️ Zdjęcie</span>
                                    <button type="button" onclick="removeBlock(this)" style="background:none;border:none;color:#f87171;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;padding:0;">✕</button>
                                </div>
                                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(block.Content))
                                {
                                    <img src="@block.Content" alt="Zdjęcie bloku"
                                         style="max-height:140px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);margin-bottom:0.5rem;" />
                                    <p style="font-size:0.78rem; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Wgraj nowe, żeby zastąpić obecne.</p>
                                }
                                <input type="file" name="Blocks[@bi].ImageFile" accept="image/*" class="gw-input"
                                       style="padding:0.45rem 0.75rem;" onchange="previewBlockImage(this)" />
                            </div>
                        }
                        bi++;
                    }
                </div>

                <div style="display:flex; gap:0.6rem; margin-top:0.8rem;">
                    <button type="button" onclick="addTextBlock()" class="gw-btn-outline" style="font-size:0.85rem;">+ Blok tekstu</button>
                    <button type="button" onclick="addImageBlock()" class="gw-btn-outline" style="font-size:0.85rem;">+ Zdjęcie</button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display:flex; gap:0.8rem; margin-top:1.8rem;">
                <button type="submit" class="gw-btn-primary gw-btn-full">💾 Zapisz zmiany</button>
                <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@Model.Id" class="gw-btn-outline gw-btn-full" style="text-align:center;">Anuluj</a>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        // Startowy indeks bloków — kontynuujemy po istniejących
        let blockIndex = @initialBlockIndex;

        function addTextBlock() {
            const i = blockIndex++;
            const container = document.getElementById('blocksContainer');
            const div = document.createElement('div');
            div.className = 'gw-block-item';
            div.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(15,17,23,0.6);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;position:relative;';
            div.innerHTML = `
                <input type="hidden" name="Blocks[${i}].Type" value="0" />
                <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">
                    <span style="font-size:0.78rem;color:#64748b;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em;">📝 Tekst</span>
                    <button type="button" onclick="removeBlock(this)" style="background:none;border:none;color:#f87171;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;padding:0;">✕</button>
                </div>
                <textarea name="Blocks[${i}].TextContent" class="gw-input" rows="5"
                          placeholder="Treść bloku..." style="resize:vertical;margin:0;"></textarea>
            `;
            container.appendChild(div);
        }

        function addImageBlock() {
            const i = blockIndex++;
            const container = document.getElementById('blocksContainer');
            const div = document.createElement('div');
            div.className = 'gw-block-item';
            div.style.cssText = 'background:rgba(15,17,23,0.6);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;position:relative;';
            div.innerHTML = `
                <input type="hidden" name="Blocks[${i}].Type" value="1" />
                <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">
                    <span style="font-size:0.78rem;color:#64748b;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em;">🖼️ Zdjęcie</span>
                    <button type="button" onclick="removeBlock(this)" style="background:none;border:none;color:#f87171;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;padding:0;">✕</button>
                </div>
                <input type="file" name="Blocks[${i}].ImageFile" accept="image/*" class="gw-input"
                       style="padding:0.45rem 0.75rem;" onchange="previewBlockImage(this)" />
                <div class="block-preview" style="display:none;margin-top:0.5rem;">
                    <img src="" alt="Podgląd" style="max-height:140px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);" />
                </div>
            `;
            container.appendChild(div);
        }

        function removeBlock(btn) {
            btn.closest('.gw-block-item').remove();
        }

        function previewBlockImage(input) {
            const preview = input.parentElement.querySelector('.block-preview');
            if (!preview) return;
            const img = preview.querySelector('img');
            if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
                img.src = URL.createObjectURL(input.files[0]);
                preview.style.display = 'block';
            }
        }

        document.getElementById('coverInput').addEventListener('change', function () {
            const preview = document.getElementById('coverPreview');
            const img = document.getElementById('coverPreviewImg');
            if (this.files && this.files[0]) {
                img.src = URL.createObjectURL(this.files[0]);
                preview.style.display = 'block';
            }
        });
    </script>
}

====== Index.cshtml ======
@model IEnumerable<GameWiki.Models.Article>
@using GameWiki.Models
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Artykuły";
    var games = ViewBag.Games as List<Game> ?? new List<Game>();
    var selectedGameId = (int?)ViewBag.SelectedGameId;
    var selectedGame = selectedGameId.HasValue ? games.FirstOrDefault(g => g.Id == selectedGameId.Value) : null;
}

<div class="gw-section">
    <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:1.5rem; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:1rem;">
        <div>
            <h1 class="gw-section-title">📄 Artykuły</h1>
            <p class="gw-section-sub">
                @if (selectedGame != null)
                {
                    <span>
                        Filtrowanie: <strong style="color:#a78bfa;">@selectedGame.Title</strong>
                        &nbsp;·&nbsp; <a asp-action="Index" class="gw-action-link" style="font-size:0.85rem;">Pokaż wszystkie</a>
                    </span>
                }
                else
                {
                    <span>Przeglądaj wiki i poradniki</span>
                }
            </p>
        </div>
        @if (User.Identity?.IsAuthenticated == true)
        {
            <a asp-action="Create" class="gw-btn-primary">+ Napisz artykuł</a>
        }
    </div>

    @if (TempData["SuccessMessage"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show mb-4">
            @TempData["SuccessMessage"]
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
        </div>
    }

    @* ── FILTR PO GRZE ── *@
    <div style="margin-bottom:1.5rem; display:flex; gap:0.5rem; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center;">
        <span style="color:#64748b; font-size:0.82rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em;">Filtruj:</span>
        <a asp-action="Index"
           style="padding:0.3rem 0.85rem; border-radius:999px; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; text-decoration:none;
                  @(selectedGameId == null ? "background:#6366f1; color:#fff;" : "background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color:#94a3b8; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);")">
            Wszystkie
        </a>
        @foreach (var game in games)
        {
            <a asp-action="Index" asp-route-gameId="@game.Id"
               style="padding:0.3rem 0.85rem; border-radius:999px; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; text-decoration:none;
                          @(selectedGameId == game.Id ? "background:#6366f1; color:#fff;" : "background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color:#94a3b8; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);")">
                @game.Title
            </a>
        }
    </div>

    @* ── LISTA ARTYKUŁÓW ── *@
    @if (!Model.Any())
    {
        <div class="gw-auth-card" style="text-align:center; padding:3rem;">
            <div style="font-size:3rem; margin-bottom:1rem;">📭</div>
            <p style="color:#94a3b8;">
                @if (selectedGame != null)
                {
                    <span>Brak artykułów dla gry <strong>@selectedGame.Title</strong>.</span>
                }
                else
                {
                    <span>Nie ma jeszcze żadnych artykułów.</span>
                }
            </p>
            @if (User.Identity?.IsAuthenticated == true)
            {
                <a asp-action="Create" asp-route-gameId="@selectedGameId" class="gw-btn-primary" style="margin-top:1rem;">
                    + Napisz artykuł
                </a>
            }
        </div>
    }
    else
    {
        <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:1rem;">
            @foreach (var article in Model)
            {
                <div class="gw-card" style="display:flex; gap:1.2rem; padding:1.2rem; align-items:flex-start;">
                    @* Miniatura *@
                    <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@article.Id" style="flex-shrink:0;">
                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(article.CoverImageUrl))
                        {
                            <img src="@article.CoverImageUrl" alt="Cover"
                                 style="width:130px; height:80px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);" />
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <div style="width:130px; height:80px; border-radius:8px;
                                                    background:rgba(99,102,241,0.12); border:1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.2);
                                                    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:2rem;">
                                📄
                            </div>
                        }
                    </a>

                    @* Treść *@
                    <div style="flex:1; min-width:0;">
                        <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@article.Id"
                           style="font-size:1.05rem; font-weight:700; color:#e2e8f0; text-decoration:none; display:block; margin-bottom:0.35rem;">
                            @article.Title
                            @if (!article.IsVerified)
                            {
                                <span class="badge bg-warning text-dark ms-2" style="font-size:0.68rem; vertical-align:middle;">Niezweryfikowany</span>
                            }
                        </a>
                        <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; font-size:0.8rem; color:#64748b; flex-wrap:wrap;">
                            <span>
                                🎮 <a asp-action="Index" asp-route-gameId="@article.GameId"
                                      style="color:#a78bfa; text-decoration:none;">@article.Game?.Title</a>
                            </span>
                            <span>✍️ @article.Author?.Username</span>
                            <span>🕐 @article.CreatedAt.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy")</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    @* Akcje mod *@
                    @if (User.IsInRole("Admin") || User.IsInRole("Moderator"))
                    {
                        <div style="display:flex; gap:0.5rem; flex-shrink:0; align-items:center;">
                            <a asp-action="Edit" asp-route-id="@article.Id"
                               class="gw-action-link gw-action-edit" style="font-size:0.82rem;">Edytuj</a>
                            <form asp-action="Delete" asp-route-id="@article.Id" method="post" style="margin:0;"
                                  onsubmit="return confirm('Usunąć artykuł?');">
                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                <button type="submit" class="gw-action-link gw-action-delete"
                                        style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.82rem;padding:0;">
                                    Usuń
                                </button>
                            </form>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    }
</div>

====== _Comment.cshtml ======
@model GameWiki.Models.Comment
@using GameWiki.Models
@{
    var allComments = (List<Comment>)ViewData["AllComments"];
    var myReactions = (List<CommentReaction>)ViewData["MyReactions"];
    var currentUserId = (int)ViewData["CurrentUserId"];
    var articleId = (int)ViewData["ArticleId"];
    var depth = (int)ViewData["Depth"];

    var replies = allComments.Where(c => c.ParentCommentId == Model.Id).OrderBy(c => c.CreatedAt).ToList();

    int likes = Model.Reactions?.Count(r => r.Type == ReactionType.Like) ?? 0;
    int dislikes = Model.Reactions?.Count(r => r.Type == ReactionType.Dislike) ?? 0;
    var myReaction = myReactions.FirstOrDefault(r => r.CommentId == Model.Id);

    bool canDelete = currentUserId != 0 &&
                     (Model.UserId == currentUserId || User.IsInRole("Admin") || User.IsInRole("Moderator"));
    string replyFormId = $"reply-form-{Model.Id}";
}

<div style="margin-left:@(depth * 20)px; margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
    <div style="background:rgba(15,17,23,0.55); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,@(depth == 0 ? "0.07" : "0.04"));
                border-radius:10px; padding:0.9rem 1rem;">

        @* Autor + data *@
        <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:0.5rem; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.4rem;">
            <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.6rem;">
                <div style="width:28px; height:28px; border-radius:50%; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6366f1,#8b5cf6);
                            display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:700; color:#fff; flex-shrink:0;">
                    @Model.User?.Username.Substring(0, 1).ToUpper()
                </div>
                <span style="font-weight:600; color:#e2e8f0; font-size:0.9rem;">@Model.User?.Username</span>
                <span style="color:#475569; font-size:0.78rem;">@Model.CreatedAt.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")</span>
            </div>

            @* Usuń *@
            @if (canDelete)
            {
                <form asp-controller="Article" asp-action="DeleteComment" method="post" style="margin:0;"
                      onsubmit="return confirm('Usunąć komentarz?');">
                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                    <input type="hidden" name="commentId" value="@Model.Id" />
                    <input type="hidden" name="articleId" value="@articleId" />
                    <button type="submit" style="background:none;border:none;color:#64748b;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.78rem;padding:0;transition:color 0.2s;"
                            onmouseover="this.style.color='#f87171'" onmouseout="this.style.color='#64748b'">
                        🗑️ Usuń
                    </button>
                </form>
            }
        </div>

        @* Treść *@
        <p style="color:#cbd5e1; font-size:0.92rem; line-height:1.6; margin:0 0 0.7rem 0;">@Model.Content</p>

        @* Akcje: Like / Dislike / Odpowiedz *@
        <div style="display:flex; gap:0.5rem; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">

            @if (User.Identity?.IsAuthenticated == true)
            {
                @* Like *@
                <form asp-controller="Article" asp-action="React" method="post" style="margin:0;">
                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                    <input type="hidden" name="commentId" value="@Model.Id" />
                    <input type="hidden" name="articleId" value="@articleId" />
                    <input type="hidden" name="type" value="0" />
                    <button type="submit"
                            style="background:@(myReaction?.Type == ReactionType.Like ? "rgba(34,197,94,0.15)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)");
                                       border:1px solid @(myReaction?.Type == ReactionType.Like ? "rgba(34,197,94,0.4)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)");
                                       color:@(myReaction?.Type == ReactionType.Like ? "#4ade80" : "#94a3b8");
                                       border-radius:6px; padding:0.2rem 0.6rem; cursor:pointer; font-size:0.82rem;
                                       display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.3rem; transition:all 0.2s;">
                        👍 @likes
                    </button>
                </form>

                @* Dislike *@
                <form asp-controller="Article" asp-action="React" method="post" style="margin:0;">
                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                    <input type="hidden" name="commentId" value="@Model.Id" />
                    <input type="hidden" name="articleId" value="@articleId" />
                    <input type="hidden" name="type" value="1" />
                    <button type="submit"
                            style="background:@(myReaction?.Type == ReactionType.Dislike ? "rgba(239,68,68,0.15)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)");
                                       border:1px solid @(myReaction?.Type == ReactionType.Dislike ? "rgba(239,68,68,0.4)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)");
                                       color:@(myReaction?.Type == ReactionType.Dislike ? "#f87171" : "#94a3b8");
                                       border-radius:6px; padding:0.2rem 0.6rem; cursor:pointer; font-size:0.82rem;
                                       display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.3rem; transition:all 0.2s;">
                        👎 @dislikes
                    </button>
                </form>

                @* Odpowiedz — tylko do głębokości 1 (nie zagnieżdżaj w nieskończoność) *@
                @if (depth < 1)
                {
                    <button type="button"
                            onclick="document.getElementById('@replyFormId').style.display = document.getElementById('@replyFormId').style.display === 'none' ? 'block' : 'none'"
                            style="background:none; border:none; color:#64748b; cursor:pointer; font-size:0.82rem; padding:0.2rem 0.4rem;">
                        💬 Odpowiedz
                    </button>
                }
            }
            else
            {
                @* Niezalogowany — tylko liczniki *@
                <span style="color:#64748b; font-size:0.82rem;">👍 @likes</span>
                <span style="color:#64748b; font-size:0.82rem;">👎 @dislikes</span>
            }
        </div>

        @* Formularz odpowiedzi (ukryty domyślnie) *@
        @if (User.Identity?.IsAuthenticated == true && depth < 1)
        {
            <div id="@replyFormId" style="display:none; margin-top:0.8rem;">
                <form asp-controller="Article" asp-action="AddComment" method="post">
                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                    <input type="hidden" name="articleId" value="@articleId" />
                    <input type="hidden" name="parentCommentId" value="@Model.Id" />
                    <textarea name="content" class="gw-input" rows="2"
                          placeholder="Twoja odpowiedź..."
                          style="resize:vertical; margin-bottom:0.5rem; font-size:0.88rem;"></textarea>
                    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.5rem;">
                        <button type="submit" class="gw-btn-primary" style="font-size:0.82rem; padding:0.35rem 1rem;">Wyślij</button>
                        <button type="button"
                                onclick="document.getElementById('@replyFormId').style.display='none'"
                                class="gw-btn-outline" style="font-size:0.82rem; padding:0.35rem 1rem;">
                            Anuluj
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </form>
            </div>
        }
    </div>

    @* Zagnieżdżone odpowiedzi *@
    @if (replies.Any())
    {
        <div style="margin-top:0.5rem;">
            @foreach (var reply in replies)
            {
                var replyViewData = new ViewDataDictionary(ViewData);
                replyViewData["AllComments"] = allComments;
                replyViewData["MyReactions"] = myReactions;
                replyViewData["CurrentUserId"] = currentUserId;
                replyViewData["ArticleId"] = articleId;
                replyViewData["Depth"] = depth + 1;
                @await Html.PartialAsync("_Comment", reply, replyViewData)
            }
        </div>
    }
</div>

====== Create.cshtml ======
@model GameWiki.DTOs.Game.CreateGameDto
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Dodaj grę";
}

<div class="gw-auth-wrapper">
    <div class="gw-auth-card" style="max-width: 560px;">

        <div class="gw-auth-header">
            <div class="gw-auth-icon">🎮</div>

        <form asp-action="Create">
            <div class="gw-form-group">
                <label asp-for="Title" class="gw-label"></label>
                <input asp-for="Title" class="gw-input" placeholder="np. Wiedźmin 3: Dziki Gon" />

            <div class="gw-form-group">

                          placeholder="Krótki opis gry..." style="resize:vertical;"></textarea>

            <div class="gw-form-group">

                <input asp-for="ReleaseDate" class="gw-input gw-input-date" type="date" />

            <div style="display:flex; gap:0.8rem; margin-top:1.8rem;">
                <button type="submit" class="gw-btn-primary gw-btn-full">
                    ✚ Dodaj grę
                </button>
                <a asp-action="Index" class="gw-btn-outline gw-btn-full" style="text-align:center;">
                    Anuluj
                </a>
            </div>
        </form>

    </div>
</div>

====== Delete.cshtml ======
@model GameWiki.DTOs.Game.GameDto
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Usuń grę";
}

<div class="gw-auth-wrapper">
    <div class="gw-auth-card" style="max-width: 500px;">

        <div class="gw-auth-header">
            <div class="gw-auth-icon">🗑️</div>
            <h1 class="gw-auth-title">Usuń grę</h1>
            <p class="gw-auth-sub">Ta operacja jest nieodwracalna</p>
        </div>

        <div style="background: rgba(248,113,113,0.07); border: 1px solid rgba(248,113,113,0.2);
                    border-radius: 14px; padding: 1.2rem 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 1.8rem;">
            <p style="font-size:1.05rem; font-weight:700; color:#f1f5f9; margin:0 0 0.4rem;">
                @Model.Title
            </p>
            <p style="font-size:0.9rem; color:#94a3b8; margin:0;">
                @Model.Description
            </p>
        </div>

        <form asp-action="Delete">
            <input type="hidden" asp-for="Id" />
            <div style="display:flex; gap:0.8rem;">
                <button type="submit" class="gw-btn-full"
                        style="background: linear-gradient(135deg,#dc2626,#b91c1c);
                               color:white; border:none; border-radius:10px;

                </button>

    {
        <div class="gw-details-banner"
             style="background-image: url('@Model.BackgroundImage');">
            <div class="gw-details-banner-overlay">
                <h1 class="gw-details-title">@Model.Title</h1>
                <span class="gw-details-date">@Model.ReleaseDate.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    }

    <div class="gw-auth-card" style="max-width:720px; margin: 2rem auto 0;">

        
        <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:1rem; margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
            <div style="background:rgba(15,17,23,0.6); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
                        border-radius:12px; padding:1rem 1.2rem;">
                <span class="gw-label" style="margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Opis</span>
                <p style="color:#cbd5e1; margin:0; font-size:0.95rem; line-height:1.6;">
                    @Model.Description
                </p>
            </div>

            <div style="background:rgba(15,17,23,0.6); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
                        border-radius:12px; padding:1rem 1.2rem;">
                <span class="gw-label" style="margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Data premiery</span>
                <p style="color:#a78bfa; margin:0; font-weight:700; font-size:1rem;">
                    @Model.ReleaseDate.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")
                </p>
            </div>
        </div>

        
        <div class="gw-ratings-row">
            <div class="gw-rating-box">
                <span class="gw-rating-label">Nasza ocena</span>
                @if (Model.LocalRating.HasValue)
                {
                    <div class="gw-stars-display">
                        @for (int i = 1; i <= 5; i++)
                        {
                            <span class="gw-star @(i <= Math.Round(Model.LocalRating.Value) ? "filled" : "")">★</span>
                        }
                    </div>
                    <span class="gw-rating-value">@Model.LocalRating.Value.ToString("0.0") / 5</span>
                    <span class="gw-rating-count">@Model.LocalRatingsCount ocen</span>
                }
                else
                {
                    <span class="gw-rating-empty">Brak ocen</span>
                }
            </div>

            @if (Model.RawgRating.HasValue)
            {
                <div class="gw-rating-divider"></div>
                <div class="gw-rating-box">
                    <span class="gw-rating-label">Ocena RAWG</span>
                    <div class="gw-stars-display">
                        @for (int i = 1; i <= 5; i++)
                        {
                            <span class="gw-star @(i <= Math.Round(Model.RawgRating.Value) ? "filled" : "")">★</span>
                        }
                    </div>
                    <span class="gw-rating-value">@Model.RawgRating.Value.ToString("0.0") / 5</span>
                    <span class="gw-rating-count">@Model.RawgRatingsCount?.ToString("N0") ocen</span>
                </div>
            }
        </div>

        
        <div style="display:flex; gap:0.8rem; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:1.5rem;">
            <a asp-controller="Reviews" asp-action="Index" asp-route-gameId="@Model.Id"
               class="gw-btn-outline" style="text-align:center;">
                ⭐ Przeglądaj recenzje
            </a>
            @if (User.Identity?.IsAuthenticated == true)
            {
                <a asp-controller="Reviews" asp-action="Create" asp-route-gameId="@Model.Id"
                   class="gw-btn-primary" style="text-align:center;">
                    ✍️ Dodaj recenzję
                </a>
            }
            @if (User.IsInRole("Admin") || User.IsInRole("Moderator"))
            {
                <a asp-action="Edit" asp-route-id="@Model.Id" class="gw-btn-outline"
                   style="text-align:center;">✏️ Edytuj</a>
            }
            <a asp-action="Index" class="gw-btn-ghost" style="text-align:center;">← Wróć</a>
        </div>

    </div>
</div>

        }
    </div>

        {
            <div class="gw-game-card">
                <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@game.Id" class="gw-game-banner-link">
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(game.BackgroundImage))
                    {
                        <img src="@game.BackgroundImage" class="gw-game-banner" alt="@game.Title" />
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="gw-game-banner-placeholder">🎮</div>
                    }
            </a>
            <div class="gw-game-info">
                <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@game.Id" class="gw-game-title">
                    @game.Title
                </a>
                <span class="gw-game-date">@game.ReleaseDate.ToString("yyyy")</span>
                <p class="gw-game-desc">
                    @(game.Description.Length > 100
                                        ? game.Description[..100] + "..."
                                        : game.Description)
                </p>
                @if (User.IsInRole("Admin") || User.IsInRole("Moderator"))
                    {
                        <div class="gw-game-actions">
                            <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@game.Id" class="gw-action-link gw-action-details">Szczegóły</a>
                            <span class="gw-action-sep">|</span>
                            <a asp-action="Edit" asp-route-id="@game.Id" class="gw-action-link gw-action-edit">Edytuj</a>
                            <span class="gw-action-sep">|</span>
                            <a asp-action="Delete" asp-route-id="@game.Id" class="gw-action-link gw-action-delete">Usuń</a>
                        </div>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <div class="gw-game-actions">
                            <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@game.Id" class="gw-action-link gw-action-details">Szczegóły</a>
                        </div>
                    }
            </div>
        </div>
                }
    </div>
</div>

====== Index.cshtml ======
@using GameWiki.Services
@model List<RawgGameListItem>
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Import z RAWG";
    int currentPage = (int)ViewBag.Page;
    string search = (string)ViewBag.Search ?? "";
    bool hasNext = (bool)ViewBag.HasNext;
}

<div class="gw-section">
    <div class="gw-section-header" style="text-align:left; margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
        <h1 class="gw-section-title">📥 Import z RAWG</h1>
        <p class="gw-section-sub">Wyszukaj i dodaj gry do swojej bazy</p>
    </div>

    @if (TempData["ImportSuccess"] != null)
    {
        <div style="background:rgba(52,211,153,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(52,211,153,0.3);
                    border-radius:10px; padding:0.8rem 1rem; color:#34d399;
                    margin-bottom:1.2rem; font-size:0.9rem;">
            ✔ @TempData["ImportSuccess"]
        </div>
    }
    @if (TempData["ImportError"] != null)
    {
        <div class="gw-alert-error">⚠ @TempData["ImportError"]</div>
    }

    @* Wyszukiwarka *@
    <form asp-action="Index" method="get" style="display:flex; gap:0.8rem; margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
        <input type="text" name="search" value="@search" class="gw-input"
               placeholder="Szukaj gry..." style="max-width:360px;" />
        <button type="submit" class="gw-btn-primary" style="padding:0.7rem 1.4rem;">
            🔍 Szukaj
        </button>
        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(search))
        {
            <a asp-action="Index" class="gw-btn-outline">✕ Wyczyść</a>
        }
    </form>

    <div class="gw-table-wrapper">
        <table class="gw-table">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Tytuł</th>
                    <th>Gatunki</th>
                    <th>Data premiery</th>
                    <th></th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                @foreach (var game in Model)
                {
                    <tr>
                        <td class="gw-td-title">@game.Name</td>
                        <td class="gw-td-desc" style="font-size:0.82rem;">
                            @(game.Genres != null ? string.Join(", ", game.Genres.Select(g => g.Name)) : "—")
                        </td>
                        <td class="gw-td-date">@(game.Released ?? "—")</td>
                        <td class="gw-td-actions">
                            <form asp-action="Import" method="post" style="display:inline;">
                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                <input type="hidden" name="rawgId" value="@game.Id" />
                                <button type="submit" class="gw-action-link gw-action-edit"
                                        style="background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; font-size:0.83rem;">
                                    + Importuj
                                </button>
                            </form>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                }
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </div>

    <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; margin-top:1.5rem; align-items:center;">
        @if (currentPage > 1)
        {
            <a asp-action="Index" asp-route-page="@(currentPage - 1)" asp-route-search="@search"
               class="gw-btn-outline">← Poprzednia</a>
        }
        <span style="color:#64748b; font-size:0.85rem;">Strona @currentPage</span>
        @if (hasNext)
        {
            <a asp-action="Index" asp-route-page="@(currentPage + 1)" asp-route-search="@search"
               class="gw-btn-primary">Następna →</a>
        }
    </div>
</div>
